notes: YouTube link-only analysis is worker-backed through the queue.
Rich evidence extraction still suffers from YouTube anti-bot/auth friction.
Scoring is stable but many YouTube cases remain low-evidence.
Instagram link-only analysis is worker-backed through the queue.
Authenticated Instagram cookies are installed on Oracle.
Worker now performs browser ingest, media download, local Whisper ASR, and frame OCR.
Live API now preserves worker-supplied OCR/ASR evidence counts.

remaining_work: Optional: harden YouTube auth further with fresher cookies/tokens to reduce anti-bot fallback behavior.
Optional: enable conditional Groq only for medium/high evidence cases after auth-backed ingest is stable.
Optional: move Oracle worker runtime beyond Python 3.8 for cleaner long-term maintenance.
